R

register(String, String, Block, Item.Settings) - 类 中的静态方法io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api.BlockRegisters
The register method You can use this method just like this below: public static final Block EXAMPLE_BLOCK = register("modid", "example", new Block(new Block.Settings()), new Item.Settings()); After register, log4j will be remind you: "register modid:example success!"
register(String, String, Item) - 类 中的静态方法io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api.ItemRegisters
The register method You can use this method just like this below: public static final Item EXAMPLE_ITEM = register("modid", "example", new Item(new Item.Settings()); After register, log4j will be remind you: "register modid:example success!"
registerAll(String, Item...) - 类 中的静态方法io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api.ItemRegisters

registerFluid(String, String, BaseFluid, BaseFluid, Block) - 类 中的静态方法io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api.FluidRegister
